(;TR[er]LB[cq:a]LB[dr:b]LB[eq:c]LB[fr:d]LB[gr:e]LB[hn:f]AB[ck][di][dj][dn][dp][ep][fn][fo][gn][gp][gq]AW[ci][cm][dm][em][en][eo][er][fp][fq][go][ho]C[FORCE]AP[goproblems autoextractor]PW[varsan]PB[toffee]PC[The KGS Go Server at http://www.gokgs.com/]DT[2010-02-11]PL[B]GPKEY[local choice]DIFF[9d]HSL[---------------++++++++++++-+]
(;B[gr]TR[ho]TR[go]SQ[gq]SQ[gp]LB[dr:B]C[Playing here is worth about 14 points over playing away in an empty corner. The stones marked with a triangle are dead. The stones marked with a square are stronger. White would have played at the same place if you played away. White would likely play at B next. RIGHT])
(;B[cq];W[gr]TR[ho]TR[go]SQ[gq]SQ[gp]C[This loses about 12 points. The stones marked with a triangle are alive. The stones marked with a square are dead. ])
(;B[dr];W[gr]TR[ep]TR[dp]SQ[ho]SQ[go]CR[gq]CR[gp]C[This loses about 10 points. The stones marked with a triangle are stronger but this is not sufficient. The stones marked with a square are alive. The stones marked with a circle are dead. ])
(;B[fr];W[eq]TR[ep]TR[dp]SQ[ho]SQ[go]CR[gq]CR[gp]C[This loses about 8 points. The stones marked with a triangle are stronger but this is not sufficient. The stones marked with a square are alive. The stones marked with a circle are dead. ])
(;B[hn];W[gr]TR[ho]TR[go]SQ[gq]SQ[gp]C[This loses about 10 points. The stones marked with a triangle are alive. The stones marked with a square are weaker. ])
(;B[eq];W[fr]TR[ep]TR[dp]SQ[ho]SQ[go]CR[gq]CR[gp]C[This loses about 11 points. The stones marked with a triangle are stronger but this is not sufficient. The stones marked with a square are alive. The stones marked with a circle are dead. ]))
